## Checklist

- [ ] Tests or docs were updated for changed behavior.
- [ ] Public API or support guarantee changes update package docs.
- [ ] Support guarantee changes update `docs/architecture/support-matrix.md`.
- [ ] User-facing package changes include a changeset.

PR CI is gated. A maintainer will add the `run-ci` label when this pull request
is ready for CI.
